violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the deli/ prepared foods kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sausage patties and bread) in the bakery 2-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, Rotisserie chickens from the previous day were placed hot in the refrigerator with their covers on. Proper cooling methods reviewed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The produce receiving door, located in the backroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must repair door. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2025

Sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Sanitizer bucket was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The produce receiving door, located in the backroom, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must repair door. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2024
The heat lamp fixture in the chicken pot pie hot hold unit was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back receiving door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
